labels.name: area/operator-dashboard
labels.description: Operator dashboard migration and parity work

milestones.title: Operator Dashboard Cutover Readiness
milestones.description: Complete parity gates, drills, and operational evidence before hard cutover.

milestones.title: Operator Dashboard Hardening Sprint
milestones.description: Address quality-of-life and operational hardening tasks for steady-state support.

sprints.name: Sprint 2026-04A
sprints.goal: Close cutover readiness gates and gather sign-off artifacts.

sprints.name: Sprint 2026-04B
sprints.goal: Complete smoke tests, audit explorer, and UX improvements.

issues.title: Execute staging parallel-run validation with real operator accounts
issues.body: Run the first full Django vs Blazor staging parallel run, complete workflow matrix, and collect at least two operator sign-offs. Attach evidence pack and close parity gaps.

issues.title: Execute quarterly staging rollback drill and publish artifacts
issues.body: Perform live failover from Django dashboard to Blazor fallback in staging, capture failover metrics, verify critical workflow continuity, and attach drill artifacts to release notes.

issues.title: Add compose smoke-test target for dashboard login + core BFF flows
issues.body: Create an automated smoke-test command (CI and local) that verifies operator login and key BFF endpoints against compose services.

issues.title: Build saved-view governance audit explorer UI
issues.body: Add operator-facing timeline/filter/export UI for saved-view governance audit events (archive, transfer ownership, and related metadata).

issues.title: Complete operator UX hardening pass
issues.body: Improve reusable layout components, table density controls, and inline form validation to reduce operator friction.

issues.title: Capture operator sign-off notes for cutover decision
issues.body: Collect and attach explicit operator sign-off records from staging parallel run to support go/no-go cutover review.

issues.title: Record rollback drill timestamp and release-note link
issues.body: Ensure rollback drill completion timestamp and release-note artifact link are added to migration docs and release checklist.
